reason: The bounded diagnostic repair is complete, but full blueprint readiness is blocked by missing public LLM credentials, absent raw public data files in the feature worktree, project-wide mypy failures, and a hard-eval baseline mismatch that is not caused by this slice.

options.description: Provide LLM credentials and public benchmark data in the feature worktree, then rerun full public LongMemEval and LoCoMo comparison gates.
Split project-wide mypy cleanup and hard-eval baseline reconciliation into separate lanes before requiring those gates for this diagnostic feature.
Treat this branch as a partial diagnostic artifact improvement with no aggregate benchmark movement claim.
